ACETAZOLAMIDE Small molecule Approved Strong 100
1 trials 1 Cochrane
View evidence

Registry trials

  • NCT04887792 — Acetazolamide for Treatment Resistant Schizophrenia (RECRUITING) PHASE1, PHASE2

Published literature

  • Cochrane review Non-antipsychotic pharmacotherapy of psychogenic polydipsia: A systematic review (Journal of psychosomatic research, 2022)

CT.gov search · Cochrane · PubMed

 Open Targets, ChEMBL ChEMBL Open Targets
AMPHETAMINE Small molecule Approved Strong 100
8 trials 2 Cochrane 5 Meta-analysis 58 Trial pubs 33 RCT
View evidence

Registry trials

  • NCT00166322 — Dopaminergic Neurotransmission in Schizophrenia, Patients at Risk and Healthy Subjects (COMPLETED) NA
  • NCT00922272 — Efficacy, Safety, and Tolerability of SPD489 in Adults With Schizophrenia and Predominant Negative Symptoms (COMPLETED) PHASE2
  • NCT03999190 — Imaging Dopamine D2 Agonist Binding Sites in Schizophrenia (WITHDRAWN)
  • NCT05770375 — Tolerability of MDMA in Schizophrenia (RECRUITING) PHASE1, PHASE2
  • NCT00208143 — Seroquel Therapy for Substance Use Disorders Comorbid With Schizophrenia (COMPLETED) PHASE4
  • NCT01760993 — Long-term Safety of SPD489 When Added to Stable Doses of Antipsychotic Medications in Clinically Stable Adults With Negative Symptoms of Schizophrenia (TERMINATED) PHASE3
  • NCT02008292 — Acetylcholine, Tobacco Smoking, Genes and Nicotinic Receptors (COMPLETED) NA
  • NCT01760889 — SPD489 Low Dose and High Dose Ranges When Added to Stable Doses of Antipsychotic Medications in Clinically Stable Adults With Negative Symptoms of Schizophrenia (TERMINATED) PHASE3

Published literature

  • Cochrane review Antipsychotics for Amphetamine Psychosis. A Systematic Review (Frontiers in psychiatry, 2019)
  • Cochrane review Treatment for amphetamine psychosis (The Cochrane database of systematic reviews, 2001)
  • Meta-analysis Safety of Stimulants Across Patient Populations: A Meta-Analysis (JAMA network open, 2025)
  • Meta-analysis Prodopaminergic Drugs for Treating the Negative Symptoms of Schizophrenia: Systematic Review and Meta-analysis of Randomized Controlled Trials (Journal of clinical psychopharmacology, 2019)
  • Meta-analysis Transition of Substance-Induced, Brief, and Atypical Psychoses to Schizophrenia: A Systematic Review and Meta-analysis (Schizophrenia bulletin, 2020)
  • Meta-analysis Systematic review and exploratory meta-analysis of the efficacy, safety, and biological effects of psychostimulants and atomoxetine in patients with schizophrenia or schizoaffective disorder (CNS spectrums, 2019)
  • Meta-analysis Stimulant use disorders in people with psychosis: a meta-analysis of rate and factors affecting variation (The Australian and New Zealand journal of psychiatry, 2015)
  • Systematic review Navigating the challenges of substance use and psychopathology in depression, bipolar disorder, and schizophrenia (Comprehensive psychiatry, 2025)
  • Systematic review Psychostimulant Substitution Therapy for the Treatment of Stimulant Use Disorders in Patients with Schizophrenia or Schizoaffective Disorder: A Systematic Review (Journal of dual diagnosis, 2025)
  • Systematic review Long-Acting Injectable Antipsychotic Treatment in Schizophrenia and Co-occurring Substance Use Disorders: A Systematic Review (Frontiers in psychiatry, 2021)
  • Clinical trial publication Pharmacologic Augmentation of Computerized Auditory Training in Chronic Psychosis: Preliminary Findings From a Single-Site, Double-Blind Study (Schizophrenia bulletin, 2025)
  • Clinical trial publication The effects of caffeine and d-amphetamine on spatial span task in healthy participants (PloS one, 2023)

CT.gov search · Cochrane · PubMed

 Open Targets, ChEMBL ChEMBL Open Targets
MECAMYLAMINE Small molecule Approved Strong 100
1 trials 8 Trial pubs 5 RCT
View evidence

Registry trials

  • NCT00455650 — Study of the Effects of Mecamylamine and Varenicline in Schizophrenia (COMPLETED) NA

Published literature

  • Clinical trial publication Acute effects of mecamylamine and varenicline on cognitive performance in non-smokers with and without schizophrenia (Psychopharmacology, 2014)
  • Clinical trial publication Effects of the nicotinic receptor antagonist mecamylamine on ad-lib smoking behavior, topography, and nicotine levels in smokers with and without schizophrenia: a preliminary study (Schizophrenia research, 2009)
  • Clinical trial publication Effects of acute abstinence, reinstatement, and mecamylamine on biochemical and behavioral measures of cigarette smoking in schizophrenia (Schizophrenia research, 2007)
  • Clinical trial publication Neuropsychological deficits in nonsmokers with schizophrenia: effects of a nicotinic antagonist (Schizophrenia research, 2006)
  • Clinical trial publication Muscarinic and nicotinic receptor modulation of object and spatial n-back working memory in humans (Pharmacology, biochemistry, and behavior, 2005)
  • Randomized controlled trial Muscarinic and nicotinic receptors synergistically modulate working memory and attention in humans (The international journal of neuropsychopharmacology, 2006)
  • Randomized controlled trial Evidence for synergistic modulation of early information processing by nicotinic and muscarinic receptors in humans (Human psychopharmacology, 2004)

CT.gov search · Cochrane · PubMed

 Open Targets, ChEMBL ChEMBL Open Targets
NICOTINE Small molecule Approved Strong 100
8 trials 13 Cochrane 22 Meta-analysis 133 Trial pubs 105 RCT
View evidence

Registry trials

  • NCT05301660 — Effect of Nicotine Transdermal Patch on Cognitive Function and Glycolipid Metabolism in Non-smoking Schizophrenia (UNKNOWN) EARLY_PHASE1
  • NCT00527020 — First Time in Human Study With GSK1018921 (COMPLETED) PHASE1
  • NCT01010620 — Screening Protocol for Research Participants (COMPLETED)
  • NCT02918630 — E-cigarettes to Promote Smoking Reduction Among Individuals With Schizophrenia (COMPLETED) NA
  • NCT07190352 — Behavioral Impact and Neural Correlates of Network-based Brain Stimulation in Schizophrenia (COMPLETED) NA
  • NCT06389266 — Network-Targeted Neuromodulation for Nicotine Dependence in Schizophrenia (COMPLETED) NA
  • NCT03332966 — Youth Experiences and Health Study (RECRUITING)
  • NCT00135772 — Nicotine and Cotinine Levels in Smokers With Schizophrenia and Schizoaffective Disorder - 2 (COMPLETED)

Published literature

  • Cochrane review Interventions for smoking cessation in inpatient psychiatry settings (The Cochrane database of systematic reviews, 2026)
  • Cochrane review Smoking cessation for people with severe mental illness: systematic review and network meta-analysis (BMJ medicine, 2026)
  • Cochrane review Psychological and Psychosocial Interventions for People With Schizophrenia and Co-Occurring Substance Use Disorders: A Systematic Review and Meta-Analysis (JAMA psychiatry, 2026)
  • Cochrane review Pharmacological interventions for smoking cessation among people with schizophrenia spectrum disorders: a systematic review, meta-analysis, and network meta-analysis (The lancet. Psychiatry, 2020)
  • Cochrane review Pharmacological and behavioural interventions to promote smoking cessation in adults with schizophrenia and bipolar disorders: a systematic review and meta-analysis of randomised trials (BMJ open, 2019)
  • Meta-analysis Effectiveness and safety of repeated transcranial magnetic stimulation for smoking cessation: A systematic review and meta-analysis (General hospital psychiatry, 2025)
  • Meta-analysis Effects of acute smoking abstinence among people with schizophrenia: A systematic review and meta-analysis of laboratory studies (Schizophrenia research, 2024)
  • Meta-analysis Testing the causal relationships of physical activity and sedentary behaviour with mental health and substance use disorders: a Mendelian randomisation study (Molecular psychiatry, 2023)
  • Systematic review Values and preferences of patients with severe mental illness regarding smoking cessation interventions: a systematic review with best-fit framework synthesis (BMJ open, 2026)
  • Systematic review Psychiatric comorbidity in substance use disorders, a systematic review of neuro-imaging findings (Neuroscience and biobehavioral reviews, 2025)
  • Clinical trial publication Carcinogen reduction in a randomized controlled study comparing e-cigarette provision to assessment only among people with serious mental illness who smoke (Drug and alcohol dependence, 2025)
  • Clinical trial publication Combining neuroimaging and brain stimulation to test alternative causal pathways for nicotine addiction in schizophrenia (Brain stimulation, 2024)

CT.gov search · Cochrane · PubMed

CELECOXIB Repurposing Small molecule Approved Strong 95
3 trials 7 Cochrane 9 Meta-analysis 10 Trial pubs 10 RCT
View evidence

Registry trials

  • NCT04020588 — Anti-inflammatories and Adolescent Schizophrenia (UNKNOWN) PHASE4
  • NCT00639483 — Efficacy and Safety of Celecoxib as Add-on Therapy to Risperidone Versus Risperidone Alone in Patients With Schizophrenia (COMPLETED) PHASE2
  • NCT00686140 — A Double-blind and Randomized Trial of Celecoxib Added to Risperidone in Treatment-naive First-episode Schizophrenia (COMPLETED) NA

Published literature

  • Cochrane review Efficacy and safety of celecoxib in schizophrenia: a systematic review and meta-analysis of randomized controlled trials (Inflammopharmacology, 2025)
  • Cochrane review TLR/mTOR inflammatory signaling pathway: novel insight for the treatment of schizophrenia (Canadian journal of physiology and pharmacology, 2024)
  • Cochrane review Anti-inflammatory medications for the treatment of mental disorders: A scoping review (Brain, behavior, & immunity - health, 2022)
  • Cochrane review An update on the efficacy of anti-inflammatory agents for patients with schizophrenia: a meta-analysis (Psychological medicine, 2019)
  • Cochrane review Adjunctive use of anti-inflammatory drugs for schizophrenia: A meta-analytic investigation of randomized controlled trials (The Australian and New Zealand journal of psychiatry, 2019)
  • Meta-analysis Efficacy and safety of anti-inflammatory drug-assisted treatment of symptoms in patients with schizophrenia: a meta-analysis (BMC psychiatry, 2026)
  • Meta-analysis Meta-analysis of genomic variants and gene expression data in schizophrenia suggests the potential need for adjunctive therapeutic interventions for neuropsychiatric disorders (Journal of genetics, 2019)
  • Systematic review Effectiveness and tolerance of anti-inflammatory drugs' add-on therapy in major mental disorders: a systematic qualitative review (Acta psychiatrica Scandinavica, 2014)
  • Clinical trial publication A double-blind, randomized controlled study of the effects of celecoxib on clinical symptoms and cognitive impairment in patients with drug-naïve first episode schizophrenia: pharmacogenetic impact of cyclooxygenase-2 functional polymorphisms (Neuropsychopharmacology : official publication of the American College of Neuropsychopharmacology, 2024)
  • Clinical trial publication Associations between expression of indoleamine 2, 3-dioxygenase enzyme and inflammatory cytokines in patients with first-episode drug-naive Schizophrenia (Translational psychiatry, 2021)
  • Clinical trial publication Simvastatin Augmentation for Patients With Early-Phase Schizophrenia-Spectrum Disorders: A Double-Blind, Randomized Placebo-Controlled Trial (Schizophrenia bulletin, 2021)
  • Clinical trial publication Celecoxib treatment in an early stage of schizophrenia: results of a randomized, double-blind, placebo-controlled trial of celecoxib augmentation of amisulpride treatment (Schizophrenia research, 2010)

CT.gov search · Cochrane · PubMed

  • Meta-analysis Clozapine use and COVID-19 risk: A systematic review, meta-analysis, and retrospective cohort evidence (Psychiatry research, 2026)

  • Systematic review A systematic review on the effects of clozapine on B-lymphocytes and immunoglobulins (Schizophrenia research, 2026)
  • Systematic review Immune System Alterations in Treatment-Resistant Schizophrenia: A Systematic Review of the Current Evidence and Future Directions (International journal of molecular sciences, 2026)

  • Clinical trial publication Extended-release quetiapine fumarate (quetiapine XR) versus risperidone in the treatment of depressive symptoms in patients with schizoaffective disorder or schizophrenia: a randomized, open-label, parallel-group, flexible-dose study (International clinical psychopharmacology, 2014)
  • Clinical trial publication Pharmacokinetics and tolerability of extended-release quetiapine fumarate in Han Chinese patients with schizophrenia (Clinical pharmacokinetics, 2014)

Registry trials

  • NCT00166322 — Dopaminergic Neurotransmission in Schizophrenia, Patients at Risk and Healthy Subjects (COMPLETED) NA
  • NCT00922272 — Efficacy, Safety, and Tolerability of SPD489 in Adults With Schizophrenia and Predominant Negative Symptoms (COMPLETED) PHASE2
  • NCT03999190 — Imaging Dopamine D2 Agonist Binding Sites in Schizophrenia (WITHDRAWN)
  • NCT05770375 — Tolerability of MDMA in Schizophrenia (RECRUITING) PHASE1, PHASE2
  • NCT00208143 — Seroquel Therapy for Substance Use Disorders Comorbid With Schizophrenia (COMPLETED) PHASE4
  • NCT01760993 — Long-term Safety of SPD489 When Added to Stable Doses of Antipsychotic Medications in Clinically Stable Adults With Negative Symptoms of Schizophrenia (TERMINATED) PHASE3
  • NCT02008292 — Acetylcholine, Tobacco Smoking, Genes and Nicotinic Receptors (COMPLETED) NA
  • NCT01760889 — SPD489 Low Dose and High Dose Ranges When Added to Stable Doses of Antipsychotic Medications in Clinically Stable Adults With Negative Symptoms of Schizophrenia (TERMINATED) PHASE3

Published literature

  • Cochrane review Antipsychotics for Amphetamine Psychosis. A Systematic Review (Frontiers in psychiatry, 2019)
  • Cochrane review Treatment for amphetamine psychosis (The Cochrane database of systematic reviews, 2001)
  • Meta-analysis Safety of Stimulants Across Patient Populations: A Meta-Analysis (JAMA network open, 2025)
  • Meta-analysis Prodopaminergic Drugs for Treating the Negative Symptoms of Schizophrenia: Systematic Review and Meta-analysis of Randomized Controlled Trials (Journal of clinical psychopharmacology, 2019)
  • Meta-analysis Transition of Substance-Induced, Brief, and Atypical Psychoses to Schizophrenia: A Systematic Review and Meta-analysis (Schizophrenia bulletin, 2020)
  • Meta-analysis Systematic review and exploratory meta-analysis of the efficacy, safety, and biological effects of psychostimulants and atomoxetine in patients with schizophrenia or schizoaffective disorder (CNS spectrums, 2019)
  • Meta-analysis Stimulant use disorders in people with psychosis: a meta-analysis of rate and factors affecting variation (The Australian and New Zealand journal of psychiatry, 2015)
  • Systematic review Navigating the challenges of substance use and psychopathology in depression, bipolar disorder, and schizophrenia (Comprehensive psychiatry, 2025)
  • Systematic review Psychostimulant Substitution Therapy for the Treatment of Stimulant Use Disorders in Patients with Schizophrenia or Schizoaffective Disorder: A Systematic Review (Journal of dual diagnosis, 2025)
  • Systematic review Long-Acting Injectable Antipsychotic Treatment in Schizophrenia and Co-occurring Substance Use Disorders: A Systematic Review (Frontiers in psychiatry, 2021)
  • Clinical trial publication Pharmacologic Augmentation of Computerized Auditory Training in Chronic Psychosis: Preliminary Findings From a Single-Site, Double-Blind Study (Schizophrenia bulletin, 2025)
  • Clinical trial publication The effects of caffeine and d-amphetamine on spatial span task in healthy participants (PloS one, 2023)

Registry trials

  • NCT05301660 — Effect of Nicotine Transdermal Patch on Cognitive Function and Glycolipid Metabolism in Non-smoking Schizophrenia (UNKNOWN) EARLY_PHASE1
  • NCT00527020 — First Time in Human Study With GSK1018921 (COMPLETED) PHASE1
  • NCT01010620 — Screening Protocol for Research Participants (COMPLETED)
  • NCT02918630 — E-cigarettes to Promote Smoking Reduction Among Individuals With Schizophrenia (COMPLETED) NA
  • NCT07190352 — Behavioral Impact and Neural Correlates of Network-based Brain Stimulation in Schizophrenia (COMPLETED) NA
  • NCT06389266 — Network-Targeted Neuromodulation for Nicotine Dependence in Schizophrenia (COMPLETED) NA
  • NCT03332966 — Youth Experiences and Health Study (RECRUITING)
  • NCT00135772 — Nicotine and Cotinine Levels in Smokers With Schizophrenia and Schizoaffective Disorder - 2 (COMPLETED)

Published literature

  • Cochrane review Interventions for smoking cessation in inpatient psychiatry settings (The Cochrane database of systematic reviews, 2026)
  • Cochrane review Smoking cessation for people with severe mental illness: systematic review and network meta-analysis (BMJ medicine, 2026)
  • Cochrane review Psychological and Psychosocial Interventions for People With Schizophrenia and Co-Occurring Substance Use Disorders: A Systematic Review and Meta-Analysis (JAMA psychiatry, 2026)
  • Cochrane review Pharmacological interventions for smoking cessation among people with schizophrenia spectrum disorders: a systematic review, meta-analysis, and network meta-analysis (The lancet. Psychiatry, 2020)
  • Cochrane review Pharmacological and behavioural interventions to promote smoking cessation in adults with schizophrenia and bipolar disorders: a systematic review and meta-analysis of randomised trials (BMJ open, 2019)
  • Meta-analysis Effectiveness and safety of repeated transcranial magnetic stimulation for smoking cessation: A systematic review and meta-analysis (General hospital psychiatry, 2025)
  • Meta-analysis Effects of acute smoking abstinence among people with schizophrenia: A systematic review and meta-analysis of laboratory studies (Schizophrenia research, 2024)
  • Meta-analysis Testing the causal relationships of physical activity and sedentary behaviour with mental health and substance use disorders: a Mendelian randomisation study (Molecular psychiatry, 2023)
  • Systematic review Values and preferences of patients with severe mental illness regarding smoking cessation interventions: a systematic review with best-fit framework synthesis (BMJ open, 2026)
  • Systematic review Psychiatric comorbidity in substance use disorders, a systematic review of neuro-imaging findings (Neuroscience and biobehavioral reviews, 2025)
  • Clinical trial publication Carcinogen reduction in a randomized controlled study comparing e-cigarette provision to assessment only among people with serious mental illness who smoke (Drug and alcohol dependence, 2025)
  • Clinical trial publication Combining neuroimaging and brain stimulation to test alternative causal pathways for nicotine addiction in schizophrenia (Brain stimulation, 2024)

1 trials 8 Trial pubs 5 RCT
View evidence

Registry trials

  • NCT00455650 — Study of the Effects of Mecamylamine and Varenicline in Schizophrenia (COMPLETED) NA

Published literature

  • Clinical trial publication Acute effects of mecamylamine and varenicline on cognitive performance in non-smokers with and without schizophrenia (Psychopharmacology, 2014)
  • Clinical trial publication Effects of the nicotinic receptor antagonist mecamylamine on ad-lib smoking behavior, topography, and nicotine levels in smokers with and without schizophrenia: a preliminary study (Schizophrenia research, 2009)
  • Clinical trial publication Effects of acute abstinence, reinstatement, and mecamylamine on biochemical and behavioral measures of cigarette smoking in schizophrenia (Schizophrenia research, 2007)
  • Clinical trial publication Neuropsychological deficits in nonsmokers with schizophrenia: effects of a nicotinic antagonist (Schizophrenia research, 2006)
  • Clinical trial publication Muscarinic and nicotinic receptor modulation of object and spatial n-back working memory in humans (Pharmacology, biochemistry, and behavior, 2005)
  • Randomized controlled trial Muscarinic and nicotinic receptors synergistically modulate working memory and attention in humans (The international journal of neuropsychopharmacology, 2006)
  • Randomized controlled trial Evidence for synergistic modulation of early information processing by nicotinic and muscarinic receptors in humans (Human psychopharmacology, 2004)

Registry trials

  • NCT00166322 — Dopaminergic Neurotransmission in Schizophrenia, Patients at Risk and Healthy Subjects (COMPLETED) NA
  • NCT00922272 — Efficacy, Safety, and Tolerability of SPD489 in Adults With Schizophrenia and Predominant Negative Symptoms (COMPLETED) PHASE2
  • NCT03999190 — Imaging Dopamine D2 Agonist Binding Sites in Schizophrenia (WITHDRAWN)
  • NCT05770375 — Tolerability of MDMA in Schizophrenia (RECRUITING) PHASE1, PHASE2
  • NCT00208143 — Seroquel Therapy for Substance Use Disorders Comorbid With Schizophrenia (COMPLETED) PHASE4
  • NCT01760993 — Long-term Safety of SPD489 When Added to Stable Doses of Antipsychotic Medications in Clinically Stable Adults With Negative Symptoms of Schizophrenia (TERMINATED) PHASE3
  • NCT02008292 — Acetylcholine, Tobacco Smoking, Genes and Nicotinic Receptors (COMPLETED) NA
  • NCT01760889 — SPD489 Low Dose and High Dose Ranges When Added to Stable Doses of Antipsychotic Medications in Clinically Stable Adults With Negative Symptoms of Schizophrenia (TERMINATED) PHASE3

Published literature

  • Cochrane review Antipsychotics for Amphetamine Psychosis. A Systematic Review (Frontiers in psychiatry, 2019)
  • Cochrane review Treatment for amphetamine psychosis (The Cochrane database of systematic reviews, 2001)
  • Meta-analysis Safety of Stimulants Across Patient Populations: A Meta-Analysis (JAMA network open, 2025)
  • Meta-analysis Prodopaminergic Drugs for Treating the Negative Symptoms of Schizophrenia: Systematic Review and Meta-analysis of Randomized Controlled Trials (Journal of clinical psychopharmacology, 2019)
  • Meta-analysis Transition of Substance-Induced, Brief, and Atypical Psychoses to Schizophrenia: A Systematic Review and Meta-analysis (Schizophrenia bulletin, 2020)
  • Meta-analysis Systematic review and exploratory meta-analysis of the efficacy, safety, and biological effects of psychostimulants and atomoxetine in patients with schizophrenia or schizoaffective disorder (CNS spectrums, 2019)
  • Meta-analysis Stimulant use disorders in people with psychosis: a meta-analysis of rate and factors affecting variation (The Australian and New Zealand journal of psychiatry, 2015)
  • Systematic review Navigating the challenges of substance use and psychopathology in depression, bipolar disorder, and schizophrenia (Comprehensive psychiatry, 2025)
  • Systematic review Psychostimulant Substitution Therapy for the Treatment of Stimulant Use Disorders in Patients with Schizophrenia or Schizoaffective Disorder: A Systematic Review (Journal of dual diagnosis, 2025)
  • Systematic review Long-Acting Injectable Antipsychotic Treatment in Schizophrenia and Co-occurring Substance Use Disorders: A Systematic Review (Frontiers in psychiatry, 2021)
  • Clinical trial publication Pharmacologic Augmentation of Computerized Auditory Training in Chronic Psychosis: Preliminary Findings From a Single-Site, Double-Blind Study (Schizophrenia bulletin, 2025)
  • Clinical trial publication The effects of caffeine and d-amphetamine on spatial span task in healthy participants (PloS one, 2023)

CELECOXIB Repurposing via ATP2A2 Small molecule Approved Strong 95
3 trials 7 Cochrane 9 Meta-analysis 10 Trial pubs 10 RCT
View evidence

Registry trials

  • NCT04020588 — Anti-inflammatories and Adolescent Schizophrenia (UNKNOWN) PHASE4
  • NCT00639483 — Efficacy and Safety of Celecoxib as Add-on Therapy to Risperidone Versus Risperidone Alone in Patients With Schizophrenia (COMPLETED) PHASE2
  • NCT00686140 — A Double-blind and Randomized Trial of Celecoxib Added to Risperidone in Treatment-naive First-episode Schizophrenia (COMPLETED) NA

Published literature

  • Cochrane review Efficacy and safety of celecoxib in schizophrenia: a systematic review and meta-analysis of randomized controlled trials (Inflammopharmacology, 2025)
  • Cochrane review TLR/mTOR inflammatory signaling pathway: novel insight for the treatment of schizophrenia (Canadian journal of physiology and pharmacology, 2024)
  • Cochrane review Anti-inflammatory medications for the treatment of mental disorders: A scoping review (Brain, behavior, & immunity - health, 2022)
  • Cochrane review An update on the efficacy of anti-inflammatory agents for patients with schizophrenia: a meta-analysis (Psychological medicine, 2019)
  • Cochrane review Adjunctive use of anti-inflammatory drugs for schizophrenia: A meta-analytic investigation of randomized controlled trials (The Australian and New Zealand journal of psychiatry, 2019)
  • Meta-analysis Efficacy and safety of anti-inflammatory drug-assisted treatment of symptoms in patients with schizophrenia: a meta-analysis (BMC psychiatry, 2026)
  • Meta-analysis Meta-analysis of genomic variants and gene expression data in schizophrenia suggests the potential need for adjunctive therapeutic interventions for neuropsychiatric disorders (Journal of genetics, 2019)
  • Systematic review Effectiveness and tolerance of anti-inflammatory drugs' add-on therapy in major mental disorders: a systematic qualitative review (Acta psychiatrica Scandinavica, 2014)
  • Clinical trial publication A double-blind, randomized controlled study of the effects of celecoxib on clinical symptoms and cognitive impairment in patients with drug-naïve first episode schizophrenia: pharmacogenetic impact of cyclooxygenase-2 functional polymorphisms (Neuropsychopharmacology : official publication of the American College of Neuropsychopharmacology, 2024)
  • Clinical trial publication Associations between expression of indoleamine 2, 3-dioxygenase enzyme and inflammatory cytokines in patients with first-episode drug-naive Schizophrenia (Translational psychiatry, 2021)
  • Clinical trial publication Simvastatin Augmentation for Patients With Early-Phase Schizophrenia-Spectrum Disorders: A Double-Blind, Randomized Placebo-Controlled Trial (Schizophrenia bulletin, 2021)
  • Clinical trial publication Celecoxib treatment in an early stage of schizophrenia: results of a randomized, double-blind, placebo-controlled trial of celecoxib augmentation of amisulpride treatment (Schizophrenia research, 2010)

  • Cochrane review Glucagonlike Peptide-1 (GLP-1) Receptor Agonists for Cardiometabolic Risk in Severe Mental Illness: A Narrative Review (Cureus, 2026)

  • Meta-analysis Risk factors associated with blood dyscrasia during clozapine treatment: a systematic review and meta-analysis (Psychological medicine, 2026)
  • Meta-analysis High-dose Olanzapine Versus Clozapine in Treatment-resistant Schizophrenia: A Systematic Review and Meta-analysis of Randomized Controlled Trials (Journal of psychiatric practice, 2026)
  • Meta-analysis Comparative efficacy and tolerability of antidopaminergic and muscarinic antipsychotics for acute schizophrenia: a network meta-analysis of randomised controlled trials indexed in international English and Chinese databases (Lancet (London, England), 2026)
  • Meta-analysis Clozapine use and COVID-19 risk: A systematic review, meta-analysis, and retrospective cohort evidence (Psychiatry research, 2026)
  • Meta-analysis Autonomic dysfunctions in psychotic disorders, interaction with antipsychotic intervention and treatment resistance: a comprehensive systematic review and meta-analysis (Journal of psychiatric research, 2026)
  • Systematic review A systematic review on the effects of clozapine on B-lymphocytes and immunoglobulins (Schizophrenia research, 2026)
  • Systematic review Immune System Alterations in Treatment-Resistant Schizophrenia: A Systematic Review of the Current Evidence and Future Directions (International journal of molecular sciences, 2026)

  • Randomized controlled trial Muscarinic and nicotinic receptors synergistically modulate working memory and attention in humans (The international journal of neuropsychopharmacology, 2006)
  • Randomized controlled trial Evidence for synergistic modulation of early information processing by nicotinic and muscarinic receptors in humans (Human psychopharmacology, 2004)

NICOTINE Repurposing via ADRA1A Small molecule Approved Strong 95
8 trials 13 Cochrane 22 Meta-analysis 133 Trial pubs 105 RCT
View evidence

Registry trials

  • NCT05301660 — Effect of Nicotine Transdermal Patch on Cognitive Function and Glycolipid Metabolism in Non-smoking Schizophrenia (UNKNOWN) EARLY_PHASE1
  • NCT00527020 — First Time in Human Study With GSK1018921 (COMPLETED) PHASE1
  • NCT01010620 — Screening Protocol for Research Participants (COMPLETED)
  • NCT02918630 — E-cigarettes to Promote Smoking Reduction Among Individuals With Schizophrenia (COMPLETED) NA
  • NCT07190352 — Behavioral Impact and Neural Correlates of Network-based Brain Stimulation in Schizophrenia (COMPLETED) NA
  • NCT06389266 — Network-Targeted Neuromodulation for Nicotine Dependence in Schizophrenia (COMPLETED) NA
  • NCT03332966 — Youth Experiences and Health Study (RECRUITING)
  • NCT00135772 — Nicotine and Cotinine Levels in Smokers With Schizophrenia and Schizoaffective Disorder - 2 (COMPLETED)

Published literature

  • Cochrane review Interventions for smoking cessation in inpatient psychiatry settings (The Cochrane database of systematic reviews, 2026)
  • Cochrane review Smoking cessation for people with severe mental illness: systematic review and network meta-analysis (BMJ medicine, 2026)
  • Cochrane review Psychological and Psychosocial Interventions for People With Schizophrenia and Co-Occurring Substance Use Disorders: A Systematic Review and Meta-Analysis (JAMA psychiatry, 2026)
  • Cochrane review Pharmacological interventions for smoking cessation among people with schizophrenia spectrum disorders: a systematic review, meta-analysis, and network meta-analysis (The lancet. Psychiatry, 2020)
  • Cochrane review Pharmacological and behavioural interventions to promote smoking cessation in adults with schizophrenia and bipolar disorders: a systematic review and meta-analysis of randomised trials (BMJ open, 2019)
  • Meta-analysis Effectiveness and safety of repeated transcranial magnetic stimulation for smoking cessation: A systematic review and meta-analysis (General hospital psychiatry, 2025)
  • Meta-analysis Effects of acute smoking abstinence among people with schizophrenia: A systematic review and meta-analysis of laboratory studies (Schizophrenia research, 2024)
  • Meta-analysis Testing the causal relationships of physical activity and sedentary behaviour with mental health and substance use disorders: a Mendelian randomisation study (Molecular psychiatry, 2023)
  • Systematic review Values and preferences of patients with severe mental illness regarding smoking cessation interventions: a systematic review with best-fit framework synthesis (BMJ open, 2026)
  • Systematic review Psychiatric comorbidity in substance use disorders, a systematic review of neuro-imaging findings (Neuroscience and biobehavioral reviews, 2025)
  • Clinical trial publication Carcinogen reduction in a randomized controlled study comparing e-cigarette provision to assessment only among people with serious mental illness who smoke (Drug and alcohol dependence, 2025)
  • Clinical trial publication Combining neuroimaging and brain stimulation to test alternative causal pathways for nicotine addiction in schizophrenia (Brain stimulation, 2024)

Published literature

  • Cochrane review The effect of second-generation antipsychotics on anxiety/depression in patients with schizophrenia: A systematic review and meta-analysis (Schizophrenia research, 2024)
  • Cochrane review Clozapine-Induced Cardiovascular Side Effects and Autonomic Dysfunction: A Systematic Review (Frontiers in neuroscience, 2018)
  • Cochrane review Risks and benefits of bupropion treatment in schizophrenia: a systematic review of the current literature (Clinical neuropharmacology, 2013)
  • Meta-analysis Meta-analysis on the efficacy of the norepinephrine reuptake inhibitors reboxetine and atomoxetine for the treatment of schizophrenia and attention deficit hyperactivity disorder (Advances in clinical and experimental medicine : official organ Wroclaw Medical University, 2023)
  • Meta-analysis Application of antidepressants in depression: A systematic review and meta-analysis (Journal of clinical neuroscience : official journal of the Neurosurgical Society of Australasia, 2020)
  • Meta-analysis Association of Dopamine Beta-Hydroxylase Polymorphisms with Alzheimer's Disease, Parkinson's Disease and Schizophrenia: Evidence Based on Currently Available Loci (Cellular physiology and biochemistry : international journal of experimental cellular physiology, biochemistry, and pharmacology, 2018)
  • Meta-analysis Genetic Association of the Norepinephrine Transporter Gene G1287A Polymorphism with Risk of Schizophrenia: A Case-Control Study and Meta-Analysis (Genetic testing and molecular biomarkers, 2018)
  • Clinical trial publication Heart-rate response to alpha(2)-adrenergic receptor antagonism by antipsychotics (Clinical autonomic research : official journal of the Clinical Autonomic Research Society, 2017)
  • Clinical trial publication Duloxetine Add-On to Risperidone for Treatment of Negative Symptoms in Patients with Stable Schizophrenia: Randomized Double-Blind Placebo-Controlled Study (Pharmacopsychiatry, 2016)
  • Clinical trial publication Double-blind, placebo-controlled study of the efficacy of reboxetine and citalopram as adjuncts to atypical antipsychotics for negative symptoms of schizophrenia (The Journal of clinical psychiatry, 2014)
  • Clinical trial publication The effect of reboxetine co-administration with olanzapine on metabolic and endocrine profile in schizophrenia patients (Psychopharmacology, 2013)
  • Clinical trial publication Norepinephrine transporter occupancy in the human brain after oral administration of quetiapine XR (The international journal of neuropsychopharmacology, 2013)

View evidence

Registry trials

  • NCT01213836 — Compare the Effect on Cognitive Functioning of Two Formulations of Seroquel, Seroquel XR and IR in Patients With Stable Schizophrenia (COMPLETED) PHASE4
  • NCT03568500 — A Trial to Explore Acceptance and Performance of Using a Digital Medicine System With Healthcare Professionals and Adults With Schizophrenia, Schizoaffective Disorder, or First Episode Psychosis on an Oral Atypical Antipsychotic (COMPLETED) PHASE4
  • NCT00222495 — A Comparative Study of New Medications for Psychosis in Adolescents (COMPLETED) NA
  • NCT00228462 — Relapse Prevention, RoW: Study to Evaluate Prevention of Relapse in Patients in Stable Chronic Schizophrenia Receiving Either Seroquel or Placebo (COMPLETED) PHASE3
  • NCT00234377 — Seroquel Switching Study: Feasibility of Switching Any Antipsychotic Treatment to Seroquel in Patients With Schizophrenia (COMPLETED) PHASE3
  • NCT00255515 — Seroquel® Combined With Cognitive Remediation Therapy to Conventional Treatment in Patients With Schizophrenia (COMPLETED) PHASE4
  • NCT00325689 — Aripiprazole Used as Dual Therapy in the Treatement of Patients With Chronic Stable Schizophrenia or Schizoaffective Disorder. (COMPLETED) PHASE4
  • NCT00334035 — Antipsychotic Therapy and First Episode (COMPLETED) PHASE4

Published literature

  • Cochrane review Comparative efficacy and safety of Clozapine vs. Quetiapine in schizophrenia and related disorders: An updated systematic review (Psychiatry research, 2025)
  • Meta-analysis Association With Hospitalization and All-Cause Discontinuation Among Patients With Schizophrenia on Clozapine vs Other Oral Second-Generation Antipsychotics: A Systematic Review and Meta-analysis of Cohort Studies (JAMA psychiatry, 2019)
  • Meta-analysis Improvement without impairment: a review of clinical data for quetiapine in the treatment of schizophrenia (Journal of clinical psychopharmacology, 2003)
  • Clinical trial publication A 6-week, multicenter, double-blind, double-dummy, chlorpromazine-controlled non-inferiorityrandomized phase iiitrial to evaluate the efficacy and safety of quetiapine fumarate (SEROQUEL) extended-release (XR) in the treatment of patients with schizophrenia and acute episodes (Psychiatry research, 2018)
  • Clinical trial publication Treatment of depressive symptoms in patients with schizophrenia: a randomized, open-label, parallel-group, flexible-dose subgroup analysis of patients treated with extended-release quetiapine fumarate or risperidone (International clinical psychopharmacology, 2015)
  • Clinical trial publication Efficacy and safety of extended-release quetiapine fumarate in youth with bipolar depression: an 8 week, double-blind, placebo-controlled trial (Journal of child and adolescent psychopharmacology, 2014)
  • Clinical trial publication Extended-release quetiapine fumarate (quetiapine XR) versus risperidone in the treatment of depressive symptoms in patients with schizoaffective disorder or schizophrenia: a randomized, open-label, parallel-group, flexible-dose study (International clinical psychopharmacology, 2014)
  • Clinical trial publication Pharmacokinetics and tolerability of extended-release quetiapine fumarate in Han Chinese patients with schizophrenia (Clinical pharmacokinetics, 2014)

Vitamin B12 Natural product Nutraceutical Approved Moderate 20
8 trials 1 Cochrane 3 Meta-analysis 5 Trial pubs 3 RCT
View evidence

Registry trials

  • NCT01091506 — A Placebo-Controlled Study of Physiologic Effects of L-methylfolate in Schizophrenia Patients (COMPLETED) NA
  • NCT05796401 — Efficiency of a Composite Personalised Care on Functional Outcome in Early Psychosis (RECRUITING) PHASE3
  • NCT00403247 — Effect of High-Dose B-Complex Vitamins on the Symptoms of Schizophrenia (COMPLETED) NA
  • NCT03790345 — Vitamin B6 and B12 in the Treatment of Movement Disorders Induced by Antipsychotics (UNKNOWN) PHASE2, PHASE3
  • NCT00611806 — Effectiveness of Vitamin Supplementation in Treating People With Residual Symptoms of Schizophrenia (COMPLETED) PHASE4
  • NCT01724476 — A Trial of Folate With B12 in Patients With Schizophrenia With Residual Symptoms in Ethiopia (COMPLETED) PHASE4
  • NCT02916121 — Potential Intervention Strategy With Folic Acid and Vitamin B12 in Patients With Schizophrenia (UNKNOWN) NA

Published literature

  • Meta-analysis The efficacy of nutritional supplements for the adjunctive treatment of schizophrenia in adults: A systematic review and network meta-analysis (Psychiatry research, 2022)
  • Meta-analysis Vitamin B12 and the risk of schizophrenia: A meta-analysis (Schizophrenia research, 2016)
  • Systematic review Efficacy of B-vitamins and vitamin D therapy in improving depressive and anxiety disorders: a systematic review of randomized controlled trials (Nutritional neuroscience, 2023)
  • Systematic review Nutrient and genetic biomarkers of nutraceutical treatment response in mood and psychotic disorders: a systematic review (Nutritional neuroscience, 2021)
  • Clinical trial publication Folate and vitamin B12 supplementation in patients with schizophrenia and low serum folate level: A 24-week randomized, double-blind, placebo-controlled study (Journal of the Formosan Medical Association = Taiwan yi zhi, 2026)
  • Clinical trial publication Randomized multicenter investigation of folate plus vitamin B12 supplementation in schizophrenia (JAMA psychiatry, 2013)
  • Clinical trial publication Plasma homocysteine levels in young male patients in the exacerbation and remission phase of schizophrenia (Progress in neuro-psychopharmacology & biological psychiatry, 2008)
  • Clinical trial publication High-dose vitamin B6 decreases homocysteine serum levels in patients with schizophrenia and schizoaffective disorders: a preliminary study (Clinical neuropharmacology, 2007)
  • Clinical trial publication Low essential fatty acid and B-vitamin status in a subgroup of patients with schizophrenia and its response to dietary supplementation (Prostaglandins, leukotrienes, and essential fatty acids, 2006)

Glycine Natural product Amino acid Phase II Moderate 20

  • Systematic review Glycine transporters in schizophrenia. A new hope or informational noise? (Psychiatria polska, 2022)
  • Systematic review Rational and Translational Implications of D-Amino Acids for Treatment-Resistant Schizophrenia: From Neurobiology to the Clinics (Biomolecules, 2022)
  • Systematic review New Pharmacological Targets for the Treatment of Schizophrenia: A Literature Review (Current topics in medicinal chemistry, 2021)

  • Randomized controlled trial Randomized controlled trial of the glycine transporter 1 inhibitor PF-03463275 to enhance cognitive training and neuroplasticity in schizophrenia (Schizophrenia research, 2023)
  • Randomized controlled trial Quantitative electroencephalography parameters as neurophysiological biomarkers of schizophrenia-related deficits: A Phase II substudy of patients treated with iclepertin (BI 425809) (Translational psychiatry, 2022)
  • Randomized controlled trial Efficacy and safety of the novel glycine transporter inhibitor BI 425809 once daily in patients with schizophrenia: a double-blind, randomised, placebo-controlled phase 2 study (The lancet. Psychiatry, 2021)

  • NCT01091506 — A Placebo-Controlled Study of Physiologic Effects of L-methylfolate in Schizophrenia Patients (COMPLETED) NA

  • NCT00611806 — Effectiveness of Vitamin Supplementation in Treating People With Residual Symptoms of Schizophrenia (COMPLETED) PHASE4
  • NCT01724476 — A Trial of Folate With B12 in Patients With Schizophrenia With Residual Symptoms in Ethiopia (COMPLETED) PHASE4
  • NCT02916121 — Potential Intervention Strategy With Folic Acid and Vitamin B12 in Patients With Schizophrenia (UNKNOWN) NA

Published literature

  • Meta-analysis The efficacy of nutritional supplements for the adjunctive treatment of schizophrenia in adults: A systematic review and network meta-analysis (Psychiatry research, 2022)
  • Meta-analysis Vitamin B12 and the risk of schizophrenia: A meta-analysis (Schizophrenia research, 2016)
  • Systematic review Efficacy of B-vitamins and vitamin D therapy in improving depressive and anxiety disorders: a systematic review of randomized controlled trials (Nutritional neuroscience, 2023)
  • Systematic review Nutrient and genetic biomarkers of nutraceutical treatment response in mood and psychotic disorders: a systematic review (Nutritional neuroscience, 2021)
  • Clinical trial publication Folate and vitamin B12 supplementation in patients with schizophrenia and low serum folate level: A 24-week randomized, double-blind, placebo-controlled study (Journal of the Formosan Medical Association = Taiwan yi zhi, 2026)
  • Clinical trial publication Randomized multicenter investigation of folate plus vitamin B12 supplementation in schizophrenia (JAMA psychiatry, 2013)
  • Clinical trial publication Plasma homocysteine levels in young male patients in the exacerbation and remission phase of schizophrenia (Progress in neuro-psychopharmacology & biological psychiatry, 2008)
  • Clinical trial publication High-dose vitamin B6 decreases homocysteine serum levels in patients with schizophrenia and schizoaffective disorders: a preliminary study (Clinical neuropharmacology, 2007)
  • Clinical trial publication Low essential fatty acid and B-vitamin status in a subgroup of patients with schizophrenia and its response to dietary supplementation (Prostaglandins, leukotrienes, and essential fatty acids, 2006)

  • Systematic review Glycine transporters in schizophrenia. A new hope or informational noise? (Psychiatria polska, 2022)

  • Randomized controlled trial Quantitative electroencephalography parameters as neurophysiological biomarkers of schizophrenia-related deficits: A Phase II substudy of patients treated with iclepertin (BI 425809) (Translational psychiatry, 2022)
  • Randomized controlled trial Efficacy and safety of the novel glycine transporter inhibitor BI 425809 once daily in patients with schizophrenia: a double-blind, randomised, placebo-controlled phase 2 study (The lancet. Psychiatry, 2021)

Curcumin Natural product Food compound Approved Emerging 7
5 trials 3 Cochrane 4 Trial pubs
View evidence

Registry trials

  • NCT01875822 — Open-label Study of Curcumin C-3 Complex in Schizophrenia (COMPLETED) PHASE1, PHASE2
  • NCT02298985 — Curcumin Addition to Antipsychotic Treatment in Chronic Schizophrenia Patients (COMPLETED) PHASE4
  • NCT02476708 — A Pilot Trial of Curcumin Effects on Cognition in Schizophrenia (TERMINATED) NA
  • NCT07523256 — Effect of Curcumin Add-On Therapy on Quality of Life and IL-1β Levels in Patients With Schizophrenia (COMPLETED) NA
  • NCT02104752 — Curcumin as a Novel Treatment to Improve Cognitive Dysfunction in Schizophrenia (COMPLETED) PHASE1, PHASE2

Published literature

  • Cochrane review Effect of Curcumin Supplementation on Schizophrenia Treatment: A Systematic Review and Meta-Analysis of Randomized Controlled Trials (The Psychiatric quarterly, 2026)
  • Cochrane review Curcumin and Cognitive Function: A Systematic Review of the Effects of Curcumin on Adults With and Without Neurocognitive Disorders (Cureus, 2024)
  • Cochrane review Curcumin intervention for cognitive function in different types of people: A systematic review and meta-analysis (Phytotherapy research : PTR, 2019)
  • Clinical trial publication Pilot Trial of Adjunctive Curcumin for Treatment-Resistant Bipolar Depression in Youth: Focus on Inflammation and Oxidative Stress (Journal of child and adolescent psychopharmacology, 2026)
  • Clinical trial publication Curcumin as Add-On to Antipsychotic Treatment in Patients With Chronic Schizophrenia: A Randomized, Double-Blind, Placebo-Controlled Study (Clinical neuropharmacology, 2019)
  • Clinical trial publication Effects of Curcumin on Cognitive Functioning and Inflammatory State in Schizophrenia: A Double-Blind, Placebo-Controlled Pilot Trial (Journal of clinical psychopharmacology, 2019)
  • Clinical trial publication The effects of curcumin on brain-derived neurotrophic factor and cognition in schizophrenia: A randomized controlled study (Schizophrenia research, 2018)

Alterations and therapeutics are aggregated from public databases (Open Targets, HPO, ChEMBL, DGIdb, and others). Natural agents are candidates from OSMF narrative reviews on opensourcemed.info/chronic-disease.html — not approved treatments. This page is for research orientation only — not medical advice.
